nameMeanings.name: Haseltine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hazeltine
meanings: English: habitational name chiefly from Hesleden in Halton Gill (Yorkshire), though Monk Hesleden (Durham), Haselden (Sussex), Haslingden (Lancashire), and Hazledon Farm (Wiltshire) are alternative possibilities. The Sussex placename derives from Old English hæsel ‘hazel’ + denn ‘pasture’, while the Lancashire placename derives from Old English hæslen ‘growing with hazels’ + denu ‘valley’. The other placenames derive from Old English hæsel + denu. There has been some confusion with Hazelton .

variants.name: Aseltine
meanings: English: variant of Haseltine with loss of initial H-.

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Haseltine was born in 1405, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, her father, Haseltine, was 26 and her mother, Mrs. Haseltine, was 21. She had at least 1 son with John Webster of Bolsover. She died in 1434, in Syston, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 29.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Abigail Haseltine est née en 1405, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Haseltine, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Haseltine, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec John Webster of Bolsover. Elle est décédée en 1434, à Syston, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Abigail Haseltine 1405 in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Haseltine 26 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Haseltine 21. Sie hatte mit John Webster of Bolsover mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1434 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Syston, Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Haseltine è nata il nel 1405 nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Haseltine, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Haseltine, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con John Webster of Bolsover. Morì nel 1434, nel Syston, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 29 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Abigail Haseltineが1405年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドで生まれた時，父Haseltineは26歳，母Mrs. Haseltineは21歳であった。彼女はJohn Webster of Bolsoverとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1434年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアシストンで29歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Haseltine(이)가 1405년 영국 더비실르 체스터필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Haseltine(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Haseltine(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 John Webster of Bolsover(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1434년 영국 레이스스터실르 시스턴에서 29세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Haseltine nasceu em 1405, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Haseltine, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Haseltine, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com John Webster of Bolsover. Ela faleceu em 1434, em Syston, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 29 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Haseltine родилась в 1405 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Haseltine было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Haseltine, 21. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от John Webster of Bolsover. Она умерла в 1434 г. в местности систон, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 29 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Abigail Haseltine nació en 1405, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Haseltine, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mrs. Haseltine, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con John Webster of Bolsover. Murió en 1434, en Syston, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años.
